tools.name: model_info
tools.description: Schema, entity counts, units, georeferencing — the at-a-glance summary of a loaded IFC.

tools.name: model_list
tools.description: List every model loaded in the current MCP session.

tools.name: model_load
tools.description: Load an additional .ifc from disk into the federated session.

tools.name: model_unload
tools.description: Drop a model from the registry; frees memory.

tools.name: schema_describe
tools.description: Attributes, parent class, and inheritance for any IfcType — useful before mutating.

tools.name: query_entities
tools.description: Type + property filters with pagination. Returns expressId, GlobalId, name, type for each match.

tools.name: count_entities
tools.description: Group counts by type, storey, or material — histogram form, not the full set.

tools.name: get_entity
tools.description: Full attributes + property sets for one entity by GlobalId or expressId.

tools.name: get_entities_bulk
tools.description: Batched get_entity for up to 200 ids at once.

tools.name: spatial_hierarchy
tools.description: Project → site → building → storey → space tree, with element counts at each node.

tools.name: containment_chain
tools.description: Walk up the spatial chain for one entity (storey + parent + grandparent…).

tools.name: relationships
tools.description: Voids, fills, groups, connections — every IfcRel touching this entity.

tools.name: properties_unique
tools.description: Unique values + counts for one property across a type set (perfect for filter UIs).

tools.name: materials_list
tools.description: Distinct materials across the model with usage counts.

tools.name: classifications_list
tools.description: Distinct classification references (system + identification) and how often each is used.

tools.name: georeferencing
tools.description: MapConversion, projected CRS, project north, true north — the geo handshake.

tools.name: units
tools.description: Length unit scale + the unit assignments declared in the file.

tools.name: geometry_bbox
tools.description: Per-entity axis-aligned bounding box (read from quantity sets when available).

tools.name: geometry_volume
tools.description: Net/gross volume in m³ for a single entity or a type aggregate.

tools.name: geometry_area
tools.description: Surface area for an entity (front/side/footprint depending on what the IFC carries).

tools.name: model_audit
tools.description: Out-of-the-box health score + a list of issues (missing GlobalIds, broken refs, orphan entities).

tools.name: ids_validate
tools.description: Run a buildingSMART IDS spec against the loaded model. Per-spec pass/fail with offending entities.

tools.name: ids_explain
tools.description: Parse + summarize an IDS file in plain language — what each spec asks for, in what order.

tools.name: entity_set_property
tools.description: Queue a Pset.property write on one entity. Persist later via export_ifc / model_save.

tools.name: entity_delete_property
tools.description: Queue a property removal from a Pset. Reversible via mutation_undo.

tools.name: entity_set_attribute
tools.description: Set Name, Description, ObjectType, or Tag on an entity.

tools.name: entity_create
tools.description: Create a new IFC entity with raw STEP attributes and get back its expressId.

tools.name: entity_delete
tools.description: Delete an entity by expressId/GlobalId. Caller is responsible for cascading rels.

tools.name: mutation_batch
tools.description: Apply N mutation ops in order, returning per-step results.

tools.name: mutation_diff
tools.description: Inspect every queued mutation vs the original parsed state.

tools.name: mutation_undo
tools.description: Pop the last N pending mutations off the queue.

tools.name: model_save
tools.description: Write the current model (with pending mutations) back to .ifc.

tools.name: bcf_topic_list
tools.description: List BCF topics in this session, optionally filtered by status.

tools.name: bcf_topic_create
tools.description: Create a topic with title/description/priority and get the GUID for follow-ups.

tools.name: bcf_topic_update
tools.description: Update topic fields or append a comment.

tools.name: bcf_topic_close
tools.description: Mark a topic resolved (status=Closed).

tools.name: bcf_viewpoint_create
tools.description: Attach a selection-based viewpoint (or full viewer state) to a topic.

tools.name: bcf_export
tools.description: Export the in-memory BCF project as a .bcfzip file.

tools.name: bsdd_search
tools.description: Full-text search the buildingSMART Data Dictionary for classes by keyword.

tools.name: bsdd_class
tools.description: Full bSDD class info for an IFC entity name (definition, parent, properties).

tools.name: bsdd_property_sets
tools.description: Pset_* groups for an IFC type (Pset_WallCommon for IfcWall, etc.).

tools.name: bsdd_match
tools.description: Suggest matching bSDD classes for an entity in the loaded model.

tools.name: model_diff
tools.description: Compare two loaded models. Reports added/removed entities by GlobalId and per-type count deltas.

tools.name: quantity_diff
tools.description: Per-entity-type quantity comparison between two models, optionally grouped by storey.

tools.name: export_ifc
tools.description: Write the model (with pending mutations) to .ifc/.ifczip on disk.

tools.name: export_csv
tools.description: Tabular property/quantity export. Columns may be Pset_X.Property paths.

tools.name: export_json
tools.description: Structured JSON dump of attributes/properties/quantities for a type set.

tools.name: export_glb
tools.description: (v0.2) Geometry export to glTF binary — needs the WASM mesh pipeline.

tools.name: export_ifcx
tools.description: (v0.2) Export to the new IFCx interchange format.

tools.name: export_pdf_report
tools.description: (v0.5) Branded PDF audit report with charts.

tools.name: viewer_ask
tools.description: Suggest wording the agent can use to ask the user for permission to open the viewer.

tools.name: viewer_open
tools.description: Boot the in-process WebGL viewer and return its URL for the user to open.

tools.name: viewer_close
tools.description: Stop the viewer + clear its selection state.

tools.name: viewer_status
tools.description: Report whether the viewer is open, on what port, and the current selection.

tools.name: viewer_colorize
tools.description: Paint a set of entities with a color (hex / rgb / named).

tools.name: viewer_isolate
tools.description: Hide everything except the picked set.

tools.name: viewer_hide
tools.description: Hide the picked set; everything else stays.

tools.name: viewer_show
tools.description: Show the picked set (un-hide).

tools.name: viewer_reset
tools.description: Reset visibility + colors to the model defaults.

tools.name: viewer_fly_to
tools.description: Frame the camera on a set of entities or a bbox.

tools.name: viewer_set_section
tools.description: Apply an axis-aligned section plane.

tools.name: viewer_clear_section
tools.description: Remove the active section plane.

tools.name: viewer_color_by_storey
tools.description: Apply a per-storey overlay (built-in viewer preset).

tools.name: viewer_color_by_property
tools.description: Color a type set by property value, returns a legend the agent can describe.

tools.name: viewer_get_selection
tools.description: Return the current selection — type, expressId, GlobalId, name, attributes, materials.

tools.name: viewer_describe_selection
tools.description: Kitchen-sink: every section (attributes, properties, quantities, classifications, materials) for the picked entity.

tools.name: viewer_wait_for_selection
tools.description: Block until the user picks something in the viewer (or timeout).
